data.title: 国际服新专辑「Twinkle☆Magic」MV公开特别礼物
data.summary: [‘Twinkle☆Magic’ MV Release – Special Reward Notice] Sensei, the 'Twinkle☆Magic' MV is now available
data.body:
[‘Twinkle☆Magic’ MV Release – Special Reward Notice] 

Sensei, the 'Twinkle☆Magic' MV is now available on the official Blue Archive YouTube channel! Enjoy the exciting performance by Sakurako, Hinata, and Mari, and don’t forget to claim the special coupon code!

➡️MV:https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=zTX1HSo9JUE&feature=youtu.be

#BlueArchive
![GpW_skCagAAo-GX.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/DisWrV7GCW4Up3271lioKfDD2lHAkthL.jpg)


[Memories in Melody - Sakurako's Edition Digital Soundtrack Release Notice]

Sensei, the digital soundtrack for "Memories in Melody" - Sakurako's Edition has been released!
Let all your worries fly away with the cheerful melodies sung by Sakurako, Hinata, and Mari!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2854189

#BlueArchive
![GpwBFffaYAQqbDj.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/6KlBEN9C2isnxpHtw6TS0jP8j7Me2NWu.jpg)
